Dialog.name: MSG_705_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 5 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}Its Arcana is Justice... No, wait, it's Chariot...? Wh-What...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 6}I only see one enemy, but I'm sensing two of them... I've never seen a Shadow like this before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}I see now. The turret is Justice, and the larger one is Chariot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}The smaller one seems to have less stamina. Now we can defeat them individually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}It looks like both enemies can revive one another. You're going to have to defeat them at the same time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_400
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}That tank's armor... It seems to be much harder than any Shadow so far...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_410
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}If only we could sever their link with a stronger attack...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}I, too, request to be enhanced through fusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}They've separated again! But our damage is split equally between them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_705_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}Are you kidding me...? They fused again!?[n]{f 1 1}
